title: Automorphisms Fixing Every Normal Subgroup of a Nilpotent-by-Abelian Group
journal: Rendiconti del Seminario Matematico della Università di Padova
publisher: European Mathematical Society - EMS - Publishing House GmbH
abstract:
Among other things, we prove that the group of automorphisms fixing every normal subgroup of a (nilpotent of class
                    
                      c
                    
                    )-by-abelian group is (nilpotent of class
                    
                      ≤ c
                    
                    )-by-metabelian. In particular, the group of automorphisms fixing every normal subgroup of a metabelian group is soluble of derived length at most
                    
                      3
                    
                    . An example shows that this bound cannot be improved.
